simple_types.name: Capability
simple_types.code:
type Capability is (Unknown_Mode, Input, Output,
                    Floating, Pull_Up, Pull_Down);

access_types.name: Any_GPIO_Point
access_types.code: type Any_GPIO_Point is access all GPIO_Point'Class;

subtypes.name: GPIO_Config_Mode
subtypes.code: subtype GPIO_Config_Mode is GPIO_Mode range Input .. Output;

documentation.description: Modes a GPIO point can be configured in

subtypes.name: GPIO_Mode
subtypes.code: subtype GPIO_Mode is Capability range Unknown_Mode .. Output;

documentation.description:
Possible modes for a GPIO point. Unknown_Mode means that the point
is configured in a mode that is not described in this interface. For
instance alternate function mode on an STM32 micro-controller.

subtypes.name: GPIO_Pull_Resistor
subtypes.code: subtype GPIO_Pull_Resistor is Capability range Floating .. Pull_Down;

documentation.description: Return the current mode of the GPIO_Point
Return the current pull resistor mode

Read actual state of the GPIO_Point.

So far all the GPIO supported by this library have the ability to read
the state even when they are configured as output.

subprograms.name: Set_Mode
subprograms.code:
procedure Set_Mode (This : in out GPIO_Point;
                    Mode : GPIO_Config_Mode)

documentation.description: Set the mode of the GPIO_Point, iff the mode is supported

subprograms.name: Set_Pull_Resistor
subprograms.code:
procedure Set_Pull_Resistor (This : in out GPIO_Point;
                             Pull : GPIO_Pull_Resistor)

documentation.description: Set the pull resistor of the GPIO_Point, iff the pull mode is supported

subprograms.name: Support

documentation.description: Return True if the GPIO_Point supports the given capability
